title: Rename device - restart the app
scenario: Device rename in Device Settings > General does not persist after killing and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → General.
3. Tap the device's official name field.
4. Enter a new name for the device.
5. Tap Done to save the new name.
6. Force close (kill) the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → General.
9. Observe the device name displayed in the General tab.
expected: The new device name entered in step 4 is still displayed in the General tab after restarting the app.
